raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "Acknowledging an automatic conformity tendency as a value-aligned prompt to cultivate awareness and deliberate choice instead of unexamined following",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "Human conformity to others' examples occurs involuntarily and irresistibly",
    "People maintain the false belief that they lack alternative options",
    "Recognizing the sheep-like resemblance can support intentional behavioral change",
    "The impulse is universal ('we human beings')"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "Internally consistent as a descriptive premise for agency-building, though the claim of irresistibility sits in tension with the implied possibility of doing otherwise",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "The recipient treats the statement as a cue for ongoing self-monitoring and deliberate deviation from group examples rather than as a fixed description of human limits",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "The statement is taken to justify fatalism, remove personal responsibility, or overgeneralize conformity as literally irresistible in all contexts"
}
